title: terrellia striata
intro: Terrellia striata, also known as the striped terrellia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Terrellia striata include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures.
